name: Boneca Ambalabu
lore:
Lore of Boneca Ambalabu
                                    


Initially, the character emerged as a creation featuring the face of Dreamybull, combined with elements of a da-couple, and it quickly gained traction in Indonesia. During a family vacation, an unusual incident occurred where oil unexpectedly gushed from the ground, resulting in a bizarre figure with a frog’s head, a tire for a torso, and human legs.
The individual referred to as Professor Ruthdi is actually Brandon Curington, a prominent black homosexual influencer in Indonesia who operates under the provocative alias of the erotic barber. Dreamybull, the origin of this character, has evolved into a widely recognized meme across Indonesia, suggesting a strong connection to the cultural landscape.
This character presents a striking anomaly, featuring a tire in place of a torso, a frog’s head, and human legs, creating a surreal visual. It is depicted against the backdrop of a bustling daytime city, with cars and buildings clearly visible. Although its appearance seems friendly and non-threatening, this entity embodies a sinister presence that instills fear within the community.
Description original text
Boneca Ambalabu.
Entitas jahat yang banyak meresahkan masyarakat akhir-akhir ini. Membuat para ilmuwan berpikir keras untuk mencari cara menanganinya. Salah satunya ilmuwan terkenal yaitu profesor rusdi, mengungkapkan hasil penelitiannya terhadap boneka ambalabu ini.
Boneca Amvalabu.
A evil beings that are causing problems in society recently. Scientists are looking for a way to solve this problem. Professor Ruth, one of the famous scientists, revealed the findings of Amvalabu.
